AdditionalAttributes.description:
Birds Eye SteamFresh Peas, Beans, Corn & Broccoli 750g - the ultimate solution for busy families craving nutritious, ready-in-minutes meals. Our vegetables are picked at their prime, lightly blanched, and then snap frozen to lock in natural vitamins and minerals, ensuring every bite is as nature intended. Each steam bag delivers 2 of your 5 recommended daily serves of vegetables, making it simple to boost your family's diet with ease.
This ultra-convenient mix is not only a good source of fibre to support gut health but also packed with Vitamin C and folate to help support the immune system. Perfect when paired with the protein of your choice for a quick lunch or dinner, Birds Eye SteamFresh can be enjoyed as a wholesome side dish or as a key ingredient in your favourite recipes.

- Ready in minutes for effortless meal prep
- Each steam bag equals 2 recommended daily serves of Veggies
- Rich in fibre and Vitamin C

An Eye for Good, Birds Eye

Birds Eye Golden Crunch Chips Straight Cut 15mm 900g - your ultimate solution for delivering that irresistible, crispy crunch that instantly elevates any meal. Starting with locally sourced Tassie spuds, our premium straight cut chips are coated in our secret recipe batter and gently cooked in 100% canola oil, creating a golden, crispy texture that's as satisfying as it is delicious. Perfectly crispy on the outside yet tender on the inside, these chips are the go-to side dish for a range of culinary creations that leave a lasting impression.

- Made with locally sourced Tassie spuds
- Secret recipe batter for an irresistible crunch
- Perfectly versatile for snacking, side dishes, or creative loaded toppings

AdditionalAttributes.description:
FANCY FEAST Petite Delights with Grilled Chicken and Turkey is a highly palatable gourmet wet cat food made for adult cats. This variety pack features a delicious combination of your cat's favourite flavours in the grilled texture they love. Fine cuts with grilled chicken or turkey and other delectable flavours, served in a delicious sauce. Available in a convenient 6 pack, consisting of 3 x chicken and32 x turkey flavour varieties. 

Exquisite recipes in delightfully smaller portions. Perfect when they don’t need as much, but still crave the ultimate culinary experience. 

FANCY FEAST Petite Delights with Grilled Chicken and Turkey is a highly palatable gourmet wet cat food made for adult cats. This variety pack features a delicious combination of your cat's favourite flavours in the grilled texture they love. Fine cuts with grilled chicken, turkey and other delectable flavours, served in a delicious sauce. Available in a convenient 6 pack, consisting of 3 x chicken and 3 x turkey flavour varieties. 

All FANCY FEAST Petite Delights recipes are 100% complete and balanced with the goodness of high protein and the essential vitamins and minerals your cat needs, making mealtime a delicious and nutritious occasion. 

Each recipe comes in a petite 50g pouch, allowing you to offer more variety with less wastage and mess. Serve alone or mix with dry food for a delectable texture, and a great way to add moisture to your cat’s diet. If your cat craves a variety of flavour combinations, try some of the other recipes within our range to keep her excited.

No one loves your cat like you do – and no one loves helping you find ways to delight your cat like FANCY FEAST. FANCY FEAST has been setting the standard in gourmet cat food since 1982, creating and crafting unique taste experiences time and again. Delicious tastes. Irresistible textures. Thoughtful details. Each FANCY FEAST recipe has been carefully crafted using high quality ingredients because your cat deserves nothing but the best. Your cat will taste the love with every delicious bite, and you will feel good about what you put in her dish. With more than 60 irresistible recipes in the range, there’s a plate for every palate.

Fine cuts with grilled chicken and turkey, served in a delicious sauce

Highly palatable gourmet wet cat food made with high-quality ingredients

No added artificial flavours, colours or preservatives

Provides 100% complete and balanced nutrition for everyday feeding

Petite serve for smaller appetite cats, allows for more variety with less wastage

Available in a variety of different flavours to keep mealtime exciting
